trusted_baseline.commit_semantics: Verified GitHub merge commit for PR #12 and exact main head from which this reconciliation branch was created. Live GitHub state supersedes this record if main advances.

last_completed_increment.title: Assess replay timing against governed baselines

workstreams.objective: Reconcile repository-local project state and lineage documentation after PR #12 merged despite a recorded blocking scope collision, while preserving all merged replay-baseline implementation behavior.
verification_criteria: the pull-request diff remains inside permitted_paths
the workstream branch and pull-request number match live PR #13
the trusted baseline is merged PR #12 commit a1812ff69ef6cb05031bced9f4dc7577c6ae8d2a unless live main advances
the merged replay-baseline implementation and its tests remain unchanged
PR #12 is recorded as merged implementation reality and as a governance-gate violation
PR #11 is recorded as closed and superseded without merge
linealert-core remains the only authoritative LineAlert implementation repository
the root README and repository-lineage guidance agree that HelixMemoryService is design archaeology rather than current persistence authority
open LineAlertDemo PR #2 and PR #3 and linealert-analysis-engine PR #1 are recorded as non-current prototype work
no deployment, equipment-control, credential, runtime, baseline, replay, timing, diagnostic, or adapter implementation is changed

verification_evidence.prior_exact_head_ci: PR #12 head 04f4be06577d4ed94a9f0291330762006b01011a passed install, lint, and tests on Python 3.11 and 3.12 before merge.
verification_evidence.current_head_ci: Resolve from live GitHub for the exact current PR #13 head after all reconciliation commits.
verification_evidence.evidence_boundary: Prior CI establishes test results for the merged implementation head, not authorization for the merge. This reconciliation requires new exact-head CI because project-state and tests change.
verification_evidence.superseded_pull_request: PR #11 was closed without merge after main advanced through PR #12.

workstreams.next_gate: Obtain successful exact-current-head CI, perform independent read-only review of the exact four-file diff, and require explicit human approval before merge.

authoritative.notes: Owns the deterministic machine-event reasoning core and current LineAlert implementation lineage.

active_related_boundaries.notes: Owns governed evidence-package and transport contracts; it is not merged into LineAlert Core.
Owns containment and policy enforcement; it is not the LineAlert implementation repository.

design_archaeology.disposition: Open PR #2 and PR #3 are non-current prototype work. Do not merge or copy wholesale into linealert-core. Reuse requires a new bounded branch, explicit source attribution, current authority boundaries, focused tests, and review.

Open PR #1 is non-current prototype work. Do not merge it into the current lineage or copy it wholesale. Preserve the repository as historical evidence unless a bounded current increment deliberately re-derives selected behavior.

Preserve as design archaeology. It is not current LineAlert persistence, retrieval, or lifecycle-system authority. Future persistence integration requires a separately governed current architecture and package boundary.

governance_incidents.description: PR #12 merged while its pull-request body and branch project state explicitly prohibited merge until PR #11 resolved and overlapping project-state ownership was reconciled.
governance_incidents.interpretation: The implementation is merged repository reality. Passing CI did not satisfy or erase the recorded governance gate. This reconciliation records both facts without rolling back the implementation.
governance_incidents.corrective_action: Close obsolete PR #11 without merge, reconcile project state and lineage from current main, rerun exact-head CI, and require review and explicit human approval before merging the reconciliation.

deployment_state.evidence: No current LineAlert Core deployment evidence is recorded in this repository state.

known_open_pull_requests.title: Reconcile project state after blocked PR 12 merge
known_open_pull_requests.action: Keep draft pending successful exact-head CI, independent read-only review of the exact four-file diff, and explicit human merge approval.
